name: supported-list-functions
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID sort([2, 10]) AS "Sort", reverse([1, 2]) AS "Reverse", reverse(42) AS "Reverse scalar", unique([ ["a"], ["a", "b"] ]) AS "Unique", flat([ [ [1] ], [ [2] ] ]) AS "Flat one", flat([ [ [1] ], [ [2] ] ], 2) AS "Flat two", slice([1, 2, 3], 1, 3) AS "Slice", slice([1, 2, 3], -1) AS "Tail", slice([1, 2, 3], 0, -1) AS "Drop last", filter([1, 2, 3], (x) => x > 1) AS "Filter", map([1, 2], (x) => x + 1) AS "Map"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-compact-nested-list
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID flat([[file.name], [file.path]], 1) AS "Flat"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-task-lambda-field-name-collisions
source:
TASK
WHERE length(map([1], (text) => text)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (text) => text = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (status) => status)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (status) => status = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (completed) => completed)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (completed) => completed = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (checked) => checked)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (checked) => checked = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (due) => due)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (due) => due = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (scheduled) => scheduled)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (scheduled) => scheduled = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (created) => created)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (created) => created = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (completion) => completion)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (completion) => completion = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (start) => start)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (start) => start = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (fullyCompleted) => fullyCompleted)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (fullyCompleted) => fullyCompleted = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (children) => children)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (children) => children = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (section) => section)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (section) => section = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (visual) => visual)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (visual) => visual = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (line) => line)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (line) => line = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (lineCount) => lineCount)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (lineCount) => lineCount = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (path) => path)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (path) => path = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (tags) => tags)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (tags) => tags = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (outlinks) => outlinks)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (outlinks) => outlinks = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (link) => link)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (link) => link = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (parent) => parent)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (parent) => parent = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (annotated) => annotated)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (annotated) => annotated = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (task) => task)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (task) => task = 1)) = 1
WHERE length(map([1], (blockId) => blockId)) = 1 AND length(filter([1], (blockId) => blockId = 1)) = 1

WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-empty-regex-split
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID split("", "") AS "Parts"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-utility-functions
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID substring("abcd", 1, 3) AS "Substring", substring("abcd", 3, 1) AS "Swap", striptime(date("2026-07-10T12:34:56Z")) AS "Date", choice(true, "yes", "no") AS "Choice", default("", "fallback") AS "Default"
WHERE file.path = "123.md" AND typeof(file.mtime) = "date" AND typeof(file.name) != "number"

name: supported-constructors
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID number("12") AS "Number", number("abc -12.5 xyz") AS "Embedded", number(".5") AS "Leading dot", number("1e2") AS "Exponent", string(12) AS "String", date(2026-07-10) AS "Date", dur(1 day) AS "Duration", link("Target.md") AS "Link", link("Target.md", "Target display") AS "Display link", object("key", 1)["key"] AS "Object", list([1, 2]) AS "List", array(1) AS "Array", embed(link("Target.md")) AS "Embed"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-dynamic-regex-patterns
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID regextest(choice(true, "\d+", "x"), "123") AS "Test", regexmatch(choice(true, "\d+", "x"), "123") AS "Match", regexreplace("a1", choice(true, "\d+", "x"), "x") AS "Replace", split("a1b", choice(true, "\d+", "x")) AS "Split"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-flat-depth-coercion-and-expression
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID flat([ [ [1] ] ], -1) AS "Negative", flat([ [ [1] ] ], 1.5) AS "Fractional", flat([ [ [1] ] ], file.size) AS "Dynamic"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-vectorized-function-matrix
source:

WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-regexreplace-whole-match-token
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID regexreplace("a1b", "\d", "[$&]") AS "Whole", regexreplace("a", "a", "$<x>") AS "Named literal", regexreplace("a", "(a)", "$01") AS "Leading zero", regexreplace("a", "(?<x>a)", "$<x>") AS "Named"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-variadic-list-constructors
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID list(1, 2) AS "List", array("a", "b") AS "Array", list([1, 2]) AS "Nested"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-aggregate-this-file-list
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID sum(this.file.tags) AS "Sum"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: unsupported-aggregate-this-file-scalar
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID sum(this.file.size) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL sum requires exactly one list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL sum requires exactly one list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-nested-lambda
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID map([1], (x) => map([2], (y) => x + y)) AS "Value"

name: unsupported-unknown-function
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID now() AS "Value"

name: unsupported-javascript-only-regex-syntax
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID regextest("(?=b)", "ab") AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL regextest regex uses unsupported JavaScript syntax in Slate's JavaScript-compatible subset
error_contains: DQL regextest regex uses unsupported JavaScript syntax in Slate's JavaScript-compatible subset

name: unsupported-flat-excessive-depth
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID flat([ [ [1] ] ], 257) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL flat depth exceeds Slate's safe conversion limit
error_contains: DQL flat depth exceeds Slate's safe conversion limit

name: supported-lambda-scope-hygiene
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID map([{x: 1}], (x) => x.x) AS "Member", map([1], (x) => {x: x}) AS "Object", map(["a", "b"], (x) => x + value) AS "Value", map([1, 2], (x) => x + index) AS "Index"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-authored-value-index-vectorization
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID contains(value, ["x", "z"]) AS "Contains", choice([true, false], value, "n") AS "Choice", choice([true, false], index, 0) AS "Index"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-dynamic-list-shapes
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID sum(scores) AS "Sum", average(scores) AS "Average", min(scores) AS "Min", max(scores) AS "Max", join(scores, ",") AS "Join", flat(scores) AS "Flat", unique(scores) AS "Unique", slice(scores, 0, 1) AS "Slice", map(scores, (x) => x + 1) AS "Map", filter(scores, (x) => x > 1) AS "Filter", sort(rating) AS "Sort scalar", reverse(rating) AS "Reverse scalar"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: supported-javascript-regex-subset
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID regexmatch("\w", "é") AS "Word", regexreplace("é", "\w", "x") AS "Replace", split("é", "\w") AS "Split", regextest("\d", "١") AS "Digit"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: unsupported-authored-if
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID if(true, "yes", "no") AS "Value"

name: unsupported-authored-method-call
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID file.name.title() AS "Value"

name: unsupported-vectorized-function-in-lambda
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID map(["1"], (x) => contains(x, ["1", "2"])) AS "Value"
warning_message: vectorized DQL functions inside lambdas are unsupported
error_contains: vectorized DQL functions inside lambdas are unsupported

name: supported-join-scalar
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID join(1) AS "Value"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"

name: unsupported-flat-non-list
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID flat(1) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL flat requires a list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL flat requires a list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-unique-non-list
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID unique(1) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL unique requires a list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL unique requires a list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-slice-non-list
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID slice(1, 0, 1) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL slice requires a list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL slice requires a list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-map-non-list
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID map(1, (x) => x) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL map requires a list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL map requires a list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-filter-non-list
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID filter(1, (x) => true) AS "Value"
warning_message: DQL filter requires a list-shaped argument
error_contains: DQL filter requires a list-shaped argument

name: unsupported-rust-only-regex-syntax
source: TABLE WITHOUT ID regextest(".", "x") AS "Dot", regextest("\Afoo", "foo") AS "Anchor", regextest("(?P<x>a)", "a") AS "Named", regextest("(?i)a", "A") AS "Flags", regextest("[a&&b]", "a") AS "Set", regextest("é", "é") AS "Unicode"
warning_message: DQL regextest regex uses unsupported JavaScript syntax in Slate's JavaScript-compatible subset
error_contains: DQL regextest regex uses unsupported JavaScript syntax in Slate's JavaScript-compatible subset

name: runtime-fail-loud-nonbmp-reverse
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID reverse("😀a") AS "Reverse"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"
error_contains: DQL reverse cannot represent UTF-16 surrogate fragments
expected_cells: error:reverse: DQL reverse cannot represent UTF-16 surrogate fragments

name: runtime-fail-loud-zero-width-nonbmp-regex
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID regexreplace("😀", "", "-") AS "Replace empty", regexreplace("😀", "a*", "-") AS "Replace quantified", split("😀", "") AS "Split empty", split("😀", "a*") AS "Split quantified"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"
error_contains: empty-matching regex cannot advance safely through non-BMP text
expected_semantics: source=All;rows=Files;view=Table { fallback_from: None };filters=call(method({"slate.dql.truthy":binary(Eq,{"slate.dql.equality":prop(File(Path))},"123.md")},IsTruthy),[]);formulas=[dql_column_1=call(method("😀",Replace),[call(global(Object),["slate.dql.regex","","slate.dql.regex.mode","global"]),"-"]),dql_column_2=call(method("😀",Replace),[call(global(Object),["slate.dql.regex","a*","slate.dql.regex.mode","global"]),"-"]),dql_column_3=call(method("😀",Split),[{"slate.dql.regex":"","slate.dql.regex.mode":"split"}]),dql_column_4=call(method("😀",Split),[{"slate.dql.regex":"a*","slate.dql.regex.mode":"split"}])];custom=[];group=None;sort=[];columns=[formula.dql_column_1:Replace empty,formula.dql_column_2:Replace quantified,formula.dql_column_3:Split empty,formula.dql_column_4:Split quantified];summaries=[];limit=None

error:replace: DQL empty-matching regex cannot advance safely through non-BMP text
error:split: DQL empty-matching regex cannot advance safely through non-BMP text
error:split: DQL empty-matching regex cannot advance safely through non-BMP text

name: runtime-fail-loud-dynamic-list-shapes
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID sum(rating) AS "Sum", flat(rating) AS "Flat", unique(rating) AS "Unique", slice(rating, 0, 1) AS "Slice", map(rating, (x) => x) AS "Map", filter(rating, (x) => true) AS "Filter"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"
expected_cells: error:sum: DQL aggregate requires a list
error:flat: DQL flat requires a list
error:unique: DQL unique requires a list
error:slice: DQL slice requires a list
error:map: DQL map requires a list
error:filter: DQL filter requires a list

name: runtime-fail-loud-scalar-length-substring
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID length(rating) AS "Length", substring(rating, 0, 1) AS "Substring"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"
expected_cells: error:length: DQL length expects text, a list, an object, or null

name: runtime-fail-loud-dynamic-regex-subset
source:
TABLE WITHOUT ID regextest("\A" + "foo", "foo") AS "Regex"
WHERE file.path = "123.md"
expected_cells: error:matches: DQL regex uses syntax outside Slate's JavaScript-compatible subset
